title: Kanmani Anbudan
description: Seeing the affection and care Kanmani receives at Jeeva's house leaves Anbu heartbroken. Later, he opens up to Karthi, fearing that Kanmani may slowly drift away from him.

title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
description: Kumaresan and Ganthimathi are overjoyed to see Ilamathi and Paraman happily spending time at their home. Rishi grows suspicious of Kalamma's unusual interest in his lost brother.

title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare
description: Abinaya lashes out at Vetri for leaving her behind in the past. Later, Sudar wins 1st prize with a touching drawing of Abinaya's life, making her feel truly proud.

title: Thaai Maaman
description: Rasathi poisons Manjamalai's mind against Azhagar's marriage.Later, Manjamalai reveals his plan to Poongodi to seek ultimate revenge on Mayandi.

title: Sindhu Bairavi
description: Sneha and Devaraj's media accusation against Siva and Sindhu leaves the family stunned. Sindhu confronts Sneha in anger and slaps her, but faces a counterattack and is thrown out.

title: Azhagae Azhagu
description: Lakshmi vents her grief to Malar, snaps at Mathi, and forces her to cook alone.Revathi, Malar and Mathi discuss the menu on a call, sparking Thangaraj's doubts.

title: Pandian Stores 2
description: Ahead of Kumar's marriage, Gandhimathi asks Sakthivel to invite Gomathi, while Pandian asks Senthil to set aside the TV and AC to cut down electricity costs.

title: Ayyanar Thunai
episodeTitle: Chozhan, Pandian Search for a House
description: Chozhan and Pandian search for a house, but every option is beyond their budget. Chozhan decides to approach his boss for financial help to pay the house advance.

title: Siragadikka Aasai
description: Vijaya questions Manoj about the truth behind Rohini's pregnancy. Kanaga visits Manoj's store, where Meena and Muthu make a sudden visit to buy an AC for Sathya.

title: Kadhal Kadhal Kadhal
description: A devastated Saranya reveals Arjun's unwillingness to marry Swetha to Karikalan. Urged by Karthik to flee, Arjun instead boldly confronts Karikalan.

title: Onna Irukka Kaththukanum
description: Kandhasamy persuades Sarasu to educate her children at a simple school despite her reluctance. Indhira faces an unexpected threat when goons arrive during her food delivery.
